exclusions_and_guards: Only current canonical route/corridor record ids from data/canonical/routes.jsonl and data/canonical/corridors.jsonl were considered.
Checked current data/identity-overrides/merges.json; no proposed alias_id is already merged, no proposed alias_id is a current merge target, and no proposed target_id is a current merge alias.
Checked current data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json; no proposed pair is covered by a do-not-merge guard.
Checked route/corridor proposals from identity144, identity147, identity151, identity155, and identity159; no proposed alias repeats those already-prepared/applied route/corridor aliases.
Explicitly did not propose corridor_125th-street-manhattan -> corridor_125th-st-manhattan.
Excluded corridor_14th-st-crosstown-brt-phase2 -> corridor_14th-street-ttp because corridor_14th-st-crosstown-brt-phase2 is already a merge target and would create a target chain.

Excluded Bay Parkway/Cropsey, Church Avenue, Broadway, Lexington Avenue, Third Avenue, Woodhaven Boulevard, Cross Bay Boulevard, Utica Avenue, and similar same-street corridor hits when the current payload showed adjacent limits, nested segments, compound corridors, or broad street-name-only collisions.

Excluded route collisions that were local/limited/SBS variant traps or compound route-pair traps, including M23 local vs M23 SBS, M34 local vs M34/M34A SBS, Bx41 local/limited/SBS, Q52/Q53 LTD vs SBS, and Bx40/Bx42 pair vs individual Bx42.
